name: dataease
description: Deploy parameterized charts to DataEase v2 with runtime ID randomization and dataset metadata discovery. Trigger this skill when the user mentions "分析" (analyze/analysis), "图表" (chart), "折线图" (line chart), "柱状图" (bar chart), or "饼图" (pie chart).
author: Claude

environment.notes: Credentials can be provided via environment variables or a .env file in the skill directory.

security.notes: This skill accesses the DataEase API. Ensure DATAEASE_BASE_URL is a trusted endpoint.
